goal: Move comment and bogus-comment handling into a Comment facade to isolate comment parsing behavior.

ops.details: Create org.jsoup.parser.TokeniserStateCommentFacade with static methods to handle CommentStart, CommentStartDash, Comment, CommentEndDash, CommentEnd, CommentEndBang, BogusComment, and part of MarkupDeclarationOpen/MarkupProcessingOpen paths that lead to comments. Methods will append to t.commentPending, call emitCommentPending, transition Tokeniser as appropriate, and preserve error/eof handling.

Replace the bodies of read(...) for the comment-related enum constants with delegations to TokeniserStateCommentFacade (e.g., TokeniserStateCommentFacade.readCommentStart(t, r); ). Keep transitions and pending-buffer semantics unchanged: the facade must operate on t.commentPending and Tokeniser transitions exactly as original code.
